users_email_unique.name: users_email_unique
users_email_unique.where: "users"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."deleted_at" IS NULL

users_phone_unique.name: users_phone_unique
users_phone_unique.where: "users"."phone" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."deleted_at" IS NULL

anon_profiles_user_scope_unique.name: anon_profiles_user_scope_unique
anon_profiles_user_scope_unique.where: "anonymous_profiles"."user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "anonymous_profiles"."deleted_at" IS NULL

anon_profiles_fingerprint_scope_unique.name: anon_profiles_fingerprint_scope_unique
anon_profiles_fingerprint_scope_unique.where: "anonymous_profiles"."fingerprint_hash" IS NOT NULL AND "anonymous_profiles"."deleted_at" IS NULL

companies_credit_code_unique.name: companies_credit_code_unique
companies_credit_code_unique.where: "companies"."unified_social_credit_code" IS NOT NULL AND "companies"."deleted_at" IS NULL

companies_registered_name_unique.name: companies_registered_name_unique
companies_registered_name_unique.where: "companies"."registered_name" IS NOT NULL AND "companies"."review_status" != 'rejected' AND "companies"."deleted_at" IS NULL

reviews_author_user_idx.name: reviews_author_user_idx
reviews_author_user_idx.where: "reviews"."author_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "reviews"."deleted_at" IS NULL

reviews_anonymous_profile_idx.name: reviews_anonymous_profile_idx
reviews_anonymous_profile_idx.where: "reviews"."anonymous_profile_id" IS NOT NULL AND "reviews"."deleted_at" IS NULL

review_discussions_author_user_idx.name: review_discussions_author_user_idx
review_discussions_author_user_idx.where: "review_discussions"."author_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "review_discussions"."deleted_at" IS NULL

review_discussions_anonymous_profile_idx.name: review_discussions_anonymous_profile_idx
review_discussions_anonymous_profile_idx.where: "review_discussions"."anonymous_profile_id" IS NOT NULL AND "review_discussions"."deleted_at" IS NULL

discussion_votes_user_unique.name: discussion_votes_user_unique
discussion_votes_user_unique.where: "discussion_useful_votes"."user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "discussion_useful_votes"."deleted_at" IS NULL

discussion_votes_anon_unique.name: discussion_votes_anon_unique
discussion_votes_anon_unique.where: "discussion_useful_votes"."anonymous_profile_id" IS NOT NULL AND "discussion_useful_votes"."deleted_at" IS NULL

discussion_votes_fingerprint_unique.name: discussion_votes_fingerprint_unique
discussion_votes_fingerprint_unique.where: "discussion_useful_votes"."voter_fingerprint_hash" IS NOT NULL AND "discussion_useful_votes"."deleted_at" IS NULL
